rationale: Round-2 re-verification of my contract-stability lens against fix 2b55d1a7 (delta = spec.go + spec_test.go only). No regression on any axis. (1) ApproveSpec inheritance UNCHANGED: 2b55d1a7 has a zero diff in internal/approve; the ValidateSpec call sites and the vr.HasFailures() gate (approve/spec.go:47-48) are untouched. The fix modifies only the package-level adrTouchpointLinkRe var and its comment inside checkADRTouchpointsExist's neighborhood. (2) Issue codes/severities UNCHANGED: SHA-blob grep at 2b55d1a7 confirms the two checks still emit only impacted-domains-load(222)/-resolve(226)/adr-touchpoint-missing(279), all AddError->SevError; adr-coverage/adr-cite-irrelevant remain comment-only (256). No new error class. Capture group 1 is preserved (`ADR-\d{4}`), so the extraction/emit path (m[1] -> store.Get -> AddError) is behavior-identical except that malformed 5-digit anchors like [ADR-12345]/[ADR-00311] now fall outside the pattern entirely rather than truncating — a NARROWING of the match set, so nothing four-digit anchors matched before is newly affected; parity surface cannot broaden. (3) plan-approve's own checks UNTOUCHED: plan.go, divergence.go, validate.go all zero diff; shared helpers unmodified. go build + go test ./internal/approve ./internal/validate green at 2b55d1a7.
findings: internal/approve zero diff in 2b55d1a7; ApproveSpec still calls ValidateSpec and hard-fails on HasFailures() with no approve edit — inheritance contract intact.

The two new checks emit the same three SevError codes at 2b55d1a7 (impacted-domains-load/-resolve/adr-touchpoint-missing); no code renamed, no severity changed, no coverage/relevance code leaked (comment-only at 256).

Regex fix keeps capture group 1 = `ADR-\d{4}`; the RE2-safe group-2 digit boundary `([^0-9\]][^\]]*)?` only excludes malformed 5-digit anchors (no match at all) rather than truncating — strictly narrows the matched set, so the emit path and parity surface are behavior-identical for all valid four-digit bare and filename-form anchors.
plan.go/divergence.go/validate.go zero diff — no shared-helper regression; go build + go test ./internal/approve ./internal/validate green at HEAD 2b55d1a7.
